sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kei tang ding a si nuam mipa khat hiah om hi,
Ka kha gi na lo nungta sak ding;
tawn lampi khat Amah’n zui nuam hi,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Singlamteh tung kilh hi, Singlamteh tung kilh hi,
Khua-ul sisan suakin, Jesuh’n Singlamteh pua!

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Amah dikin hong it a, kei ading nuam hi,
Mawhsakna om nawnlo ka suahtak lam ka thei,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ama tung kipia ning, kikhen nawnlo dingin,
Ka lung sung la sa-in ka kam tawh zong phat ning,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ka vangik teng nga ning kisuan kik nawn kei ning,
To Jesuh singlamteh tungah suan khin zo ing,
Amah’n kei hong tankhia khinzo hi.
